name: 86 board template
description: Visible status board for depletion risk, substitutions, and item availability decisions before they reach the guest as surprise.
source_ref: core-v2: stock truth should be shared before service pressure turns it into confusion
usage_moment: Use before service and update whenever item availability materially changes.
expected_output: A visible list of 86 items, depletion risks, substitutions, and sell-through priorities.
